scripts.build: bun run build:lib && astro build && bun run verify:package
scripts.build:browser: bun build src/index.js --format=iife --outfile=./public/dist/sprucex.js && bun build src/index.js --format=iife --minify --outfile=./public/dist/sprucex.min.js
scripts.build:module: bun build src/index.js --format=esm --outfile=./lib/sprucex.mjs && bun build src/index.js --format=cjs --outfile=./lib/sprucex.cjs
scripts.build:lib: bun run build:browser && bun run build:module && bun run build:types
scripts.test: bun run build:lib && bun test && bun run verify:package
